author: mariusvanderwijden
content: I'm not happy with the way this happened. It completely surpassed the acd process and it goes back to the "convenient and small, but hidden complexity" problem that we had with Pectra

author: funnygiulio
content: we can modify EIPs in devnets (we are even adding new ones late)? however, yeah, it seems that most people are fine with it. I think this is a good outcome so if the process does not allow it, I think it is a flaw with the process personally
